# NEL Innovation Labs
> AI development studio that builds production-ready AI systems for businesses needing measurable impact

## About
NEL Innovation Labs is an AI development studio that creates production-ready AI systems for businesses across Australia and internationally. The company specializes in custom AI development, complex system architecture, and full-stack AI product development, focusing on measurable business impact rather than consulting. NEL operates from Sydney, Australia and has delivered systems with demonstrated results like 95% accuracy AI diagnostics and 50+ agent orchestration platforms.

## Key Pages
- https://nelinnovationlabs.com - Homepage and company overview
- https://nelinnovationlabs.com#services - AI development services
- https://nelinnovationlabs.com#portfolio - Production systems portfolio
- https://nelinnovationlabs.com#contact-form - Project inquiry form

## Use Cases
- Custom AI development for businesses needing multi-model integration and RAG systems
- AI strategy and architecture for companies requiring complex agent orchestration
- Full-stack AI product development for businesses launching tiered SaaS platforms

## Integrations
- Supabase (database and backend)
- OpenAI (GPT models)
- Claude (Anthropic models)
- Gemini (Google models)
- React/Next.js (frontend frameworks)
- Laravel/Livewire (backend frameworks)

## Pricing
Custom project pricing - contact for consultation and project scoping
